name: rad-react
description: Modern React best practices — functional components, hooks, JSX, props, state, routing, forms, data fetching, server/client boundaries, accessibility, security, TypeScript, testing, performance optimization, and code organization. Includes React 19 patterns (useActionState, useFormStatus, useOptimistic), security (XSS, IDOR, Server Actions auth), useEffect anti-patterns, and AI coding assistant mistake detection. Current practices only, no class components.
